phases.name: Engine Foundation
phases.description: Resource class scripts, builder scripts, engine scripts, PSX sky shader. Pure infrastructure -- no game content.

phases.name: Room Declarations
phases.description: Convert all 20 rooms from docs to .tres declarations. World scaffolding, state schema, items, puzzles, endings.

phases.name: Creative Content (Weave Text)
phases.description: Write all thread-variant dialogue, key narratives, ending texts. The creative writing that makes Weave real.

phases.name: Junction + Puzzle Implementation
phases.description: 12 diamond puzzle variants, 6 swap puzzles, PRNG engine, constraint validation.

phases.name: Integration + Testing
phases.description: Wire all 11 addons, generate tests from declarations, validate all 48 configurations, Android build.

tasks.description: Create all 20 Resource class scripts for the declaration system
tasks.details: Create GDScript Resource classes in `engine/declarations/`. Each is a `class_name X extends Resource` with @export vars exactly matching ENGINE_SPEC.md. Classes: WorldDeclaration, RoomDeclaration, InteractableDecl, ResponseDecl, ProgressionStep, LightDecl, PropDecl, Connection, RoomRef, MacroThread, JunctionDecl, VariantDecl, PuzzleDeclaration, PuzzleStepDecl, PuzzleVariation, ClueDecl, ItemDeclaration, EndingDecl, PhaseDecl, PhaseTransition, ElizabethStateDecl, ElizabethTransition, GlobalTrigger, TriggerDecl, ActionDecl, AmbientEventDecl, ConditionalEventDecl, FlashbackDecl, StateSchema, StateVarDecl, PlayerDeclaration, AccessibilityDecl, SkyDeclaration, EnvironmentDeclaration. Reference: docs/ENGINE_SPEC.md lines 82-600 for exact @export signatures.

completion_criteria.criteria: All 34 Resource class scripts exist in engine/declarations/
Each script has class_name matching ENGINE_SPEC
All @export vars from ENGINE_SPEC are present with correct types
Godot can parse all scripts without error

tasks.description: Create 8 builder scripts for procedural geometry generation
tasks.details: Create builder scripts in `builders/`. Each builder reads declaration data and generates Godot Node3D subtrees. Builders: wall_builder.gd (textured wall segments with doorway/window openings from wall_layout strings), floor_builder.gd (tiled QuadMesh + collision), ceiling_builder.gd (tiled QuadMesh), door_builder.gd (frame + panel + hinge + AnimatableBody3D per INTERACTIVE_DOORS_PLAN.md), window_builder.gd (frame + pane + optional boards/shutters), stairs_builder.gd (staircase with side boxing), trapdoor_builder.gd (floor hatch with hinge), ladder_builder.gd (drop-down or wall ladder). Reference: docs/ENGINE_SPEC.md file structure, docs/INTERACTIVE_DOORS_PLAN.md for door/window details.

completion_criteria.criteria: All 8 builder scripts exist in builders/
door_builder creates frame + panel + hinge + collision per INTERACTIVE_DOORS_PLAN
floor_builder generates StaticBody3D with collision on Layer 1
All builders accept declaration data and return Node3D

tasks.description: Create room_assembler.gd -- the core engine that reads RoomDeclaration and builds scene tree
tasks.details: The room_assembler reads a RoomDeclaration .tres and calls builders to generate the complete Node3D scene tree. Output structure: RoomRoot (Node3D with room_base script) -> Geometry/ (walls, floor, ceiling via builders) -> Doors/ (via door_builder from connections) -> Windows/ (via window_builder) -> Lighting/ (OmniLight3D/SpotLight3D from LightDecl) -> Interactables/ (Area3D on Layer 3 from InteractableDecl) -> Connections/ (Area3D on Layer 4 from Connection) -> Props/ (MeshInstance3D from GLB) -> Audio/ (ReverbZone Area3D). Must handle: exterior vs interior (sky vs keep), wall_layout parsing, connection lookup for door details, flickering light setup, interactable collision sizing. Budget: 250-300 LOC. Reference: docs/ENGINE_SPEC.md 'Room Assembler' section.

completion_criteria.criteria: Has function that accepts RoomDeclaration and returns Node3D
Creates Area3D on Layer 3 (collision_layer = 4) for interactables
Creates Area3D on Layer 4 (collision_layer = 8) for connections
Handles is_exterior flag for environment switching

tasks.details: Handles all player-interactable interactions from declarations. Flow: 1) Look up InteractableDecl by ID. 2) Check thread_active (skip if wrong macro thread). 3) Check thread_responses (use thread-specific if present). 4) Check locked -> check inventory for key_id or functional_slot -> unlock or show locked_response_no_key/locked_response_wrong_key. 5) If progressive, advance through progression_steps (track via state var '{id}_step'). 6) Otherwise iterate responses array, evaluate conditions, first match wins. 7) Execute set_state mutations. 8) Give items if applicable. 9) Notify puzzle_engine. No switch statements, no hardcoded types. Budget: 150-200 LOC. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'Interaction Engine' section.

completion_criteria.criteria: Handles progressive interactions with step tracking
Evaluates response conditions using state expression parser
Checks functional_slot in addition to key_id

tasks.description: Create puzzle_engine.gd -- tracks puzzle progress from declarations
tasks.details: Loads all PuzzleDeclaration resources at game start. On each state change, checks if any puzzle step completed. Validates puzzle dependency graph (no cycles, all prerequisites achievable). On puzzle completion, sets reward_states and reward_items. Integrates with PRNG engine for variation points. Budget: 150-200 LOC. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'Puzzle Engine' section.

completion_criteria.criteria: Checks step completion on state changes

tasks.description: Create state_machine.gd with state expression parser
tasks.details: Manages all game state from StateSchema declarations. Includes a state expression parser that evaluates conditions like: 'found_first_clue', 'NOT knows_full_truth', 'A AND B', 'A OR B', 'count >= 3', 'phase == horror', 'HAS attic_key', 'NOT HAS cellar_key', 'VISITED parlor', 'NOT VISITED attic'. Also manages game phase HSM (Exploration -> Discovery -> Horror -> Resolution) and Elizabeth presence sub-HSM (Dormant -> Watching -> Active -> Confrontation) from WorldDeclaration. Evaluates PhaseTransitions on state changes. Budget: 100-150 LOC for state + 50-80 LOC for expression parser. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'State Expression Language' section.

tasks.description: Create audio_engine.gd -- manages ambient loops, tension layers, SFX, footsteps
tasks.details: Reads room audio config from RoomDeclaration (ambient_loop, tension_loop, reverb_bus, footstep_surface). Manages 3 audio layers: base ambient (crossfade on room transition), tension layer (activate on elizabeth_aware, volume from game phase), SFX (one-shot from ActionDecl.play_sfx). Integrates with AdaptiSound addon. Reference: docs/AUDIO_WIRING_PLAN.md for complete SFX mapping. Budget: 150-200 LOC.

completion_criteria.criteria: Crossfades ambient loops on room transition

tasks.description: Create trigger_engine.gd -- handles entry/exit/timed/conditional room events + global triggers
tasks.details: Reads TriggerDecl, AmbientEventDecl, ConditionalEventDecl, FlashbackDecl from room declarations and GlobalTrigger from WorldDeclaration. On room entry: evaluate on_entry triggers. On room exit: evaluate on_exit triggers. Ambient events: timed periodic SFX. Conditional events: watch state for conditions. Flashbacks: spawn model + PSX fade + stinger. Global triggers: evaluate on every state change regardless of room. All triggers respect 'once' flag tracked by trigger_id. Executes ActionDecl actions (set_state, play_sfx, show_text, camera_shake, light_change, spawn_model, psx_fade). Budget: 100-150 LOC.

tasks.description: Create prng_engine.gd -- seed-based junction resolution and declaration patching
tasks.details: At game start: 1) Generate or use provided seed. 2) Determine macro thread from seed (captive/mourning/sovereign). 3) For each JunctionDecl, resolve to variant A or B using macro_preference + PRNG for variety. 4) Patch affected room declarations: set interactable thread_active, swap active/static lists, update clue text via prng_var_name text_variants. 5) For PuzzleVariation points: select from alternatives, validate against constraints. 6) Log seed + all selections for reproducibility. Budget: 80-120 LOC. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'PRNG Engine' section, WEAVE_ARCHITECTURE.md junction system.

completion_criteria.criteria: Patches interactable active/static based on resolution

tasks.description: Create test_generator.gd -- reads declarations, generates test expectations
tasks.details: Reads all declarations and generates test expectations for gdUnit4. For each room: expected interactable IDs, connection targets, light count/flickering, audio loop, footstep surface. For each puzzle: simulate step chain, verify completion state, verify item locations. For each connection: bidirectional validation (A->B implies B->A). For PRNG: run N seeds, verify all puzzles solvable per dependency graph. For endings: simulate trigger conditions, verify text sequences. Output is either a report or generated test scripts. Budget: 150-200 LOC.

Create the PSX-style night sky shader exactly as specified in ENGINE_SPEC.md. shader_type sky. Uniforms: sky_color_top, sky_color_horizon, star_density, star_brightness, moon_size, moon_color, cloud_density, cloud_color, color_depth, dither_strength. Features: hash-based stars (posterized), moon disc from LIGHT0_DIRECTION, overcast cloud layer from noise, PSX color depth reduction, 4x4 Bayer dithering. CRITICAL: No TIME uniform -- radiance cubemap renders once and caches. Uses AT_CUBEMAP_PASS. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'PSX Sky Shader Design' section (lines 1036-1123) for exact GLSL code.

tasks.description: Create world.tres -- top-level game definition with all world-scope data
tasks.details: Create declarations/world.tres as a WorldDeclaration resource. Set starting_room='front_gate', starting_position, starting_rotation_y. Define rooms array with RoomRef for all 20 rooms. Define area_environments dict with 6 EnvironmentDeclaration presets (grounds, ground_floor, upper_floor, basement, deep_basement, attic). Define phases array (Exploration, Discovery, Horror, Resolution). Define phase_transitions. Define elizabeth_states (dormant, watching, active, confrontation) and elizabeth_transitions. Define player config. Define accessibility defaults. Leave macro_threads, junctions, endings arrays empty (filled in Phase 3/4). Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md WorldDeclaration.

completion_criteria.criteria: declarations/world.tres exists and loads as WorldDeclaration
All 20 rooms listed in rooms array

tasks.description: Create state_schema.tres -- all state variables for the entire game
tasks.details: Create declarations/state_schema.tres with every state variable used across all rooms, puzzles, and triggers. Include: per-interactable flags (examined_foyer_clock, read_diary, etc.), puzzle progress flags (found_first_clue, attic_unlocked, etc.), phase flags (elizabeth_aware, knows_full_truth), inventory tracking, visit tracking, thread state variables, junction resolution state. Each StateVarDecl has: name, type (bool/int/string/list), initial_value, description, set_by array, read_by array, prng_eligible flag. Derive from: all room docs interactables sections (flags set), puzzle docs, MASTER_SCRIPT.md state references.

completion_criteria.criteria: Contains all flags referenced in room docs
Each variable has set_by and read_by cross-references

tasks.details: Create 6 EnvironmentDeclaration resources referenced by world.tres area_environments. Presets: grounds (sky + PSX night, light cold fog, ACES 0.8), ground_floor (keep, warm dust fog, ACES 1.0), upper_floor (keep, warm dust fog, ACES 0.9), basement (keep, cold grey fog, ACES 0.7), deep_basement (keep, dense cold fog, ACES 0.5), attic (keep, thin dust fog, ACES 0.6). Include sky, fog, tonemap, glow, ssao, ambient settings from ENGINE_SPEC per-area table.

completion_criteria.criteria: Each matches ENGINE_SPEC per-area table values

tasks.description: Create all 34 Connection resources in world.tres
tasks.details: Define all room-to-room connections in the WorldDeclaration.connections array. Each Connection has: id ('{from}_to_{to}'), from_room, to_room, direction, type (door/double_door/heavy_door/hidden_door/gate/stairs/trapdoor/ladder/path), position_in_from, position_in_to, spawn_rotation_y, locked flag, key_id, door_texture, frame_texture, open_sfx, close_sfx. Reference: each room's docs/rooms/{room}/connections.md for connection details. Reference: docs/INTERACTIVE_DOORS_PLAN.md for texture assignments and door types per room. All connections must be bidirectional (A->B and B->A both exist).

tasks.details: Create 3 MacroThread resources in world.tres macro_threads array. For each: thread_id, question, elizabeth_nature, house_nature, ending_id, diary_page_text, elizabeth_letter_text, elizabeth_final_note_text, ritual_sequence_texts. Captive: 'How do I free her?', trapped spirit, cage, freedom ending. Mourning: 'How do I honor her?', grieving soul, memorial, forgiveness ending. Sovereign: 'How do I understand her?', being of power, instrument, acceptance ending. Reference: WEAVE_ARCHITECTURE.md 'Three Layers' section for tone definitions.

tasks.description: Write Captive thread-variant texts for ~30 interactables

Elizabeth is trapped. Everything locked, sealed, stopped. ~30 interactables need Captive-specific response text. Reference: WEAVE_ARCHITECTURE.md 'Captive Thread' narrative walk-through, WEAVE_BALANCE.md per-room content map for which interactables need variants.

completion_criteria.criteria: All thread-variant interactables in WEAVE_BALANCE have captive responses

tasks.description: Write Mourning thread-variant texts for ~30 interactables

Elizabeth is a grieving soul. Reference: WEAVE_ARCHITECTURE.md 'Mourning Thread' narrative, WEAVE_BALANCE.md per-room content map.

completion_criteria.criteria: All thread-variant interactables have mourning responses
Mourning tone consistent: grief, preservation, frozen time

tasks.description: Write Sovereign thread-variant texts for ~30 interactables
tasks.details: Write thread_responses entries for the Sovereign thread. Tone: alive house, breathing lamps, watching mirrors, mechanisms, control, sentience. The house is her instrument. Elizabeth is a being of power. Reference: WEAVE_ARCHITECTURE.md 'Sovereign Thread' narrative, WEAVE_BALANCE.md per-room content map.

tasks.description: Write 3 diary page texts (one per macro thread)
tasks.details: The diary page in the parlor is the first major clue -- sets the emotional tone for the entire playthrough. Captive: 'I locked the door. She cannot leave.' (control, guilt). Mourning: 'I hear her crying through the walls.' (grief, helplessness). Sovereign: 'She won't stop looking at me.' (fear of power). These go in MacroThread.diary_page_text. Each ~100-200 words, in Lord Ashworth's voice.

completion_criteria.criteria: In Lord Ashworth's voice, period-appropriate language

tasks.description: Write 3 Elizabeth letter texts (one per macro thread)
tasks.details: Found in attic storage. Elizabeth's voice, a child writing about her experience. Captive: the doll listens, she can't leave, asking to be found. Mourning: the doll is her only friend, she forgives them, asking for understanding. Sovereign: the doll is a tool, she chose this, explaining her power. Each ~200-300 words.

tasks.description: Write 3 Elizabeth final note texts (one per macro thread)
tasks.details: Found in hidden chamber. The revelation that defines the ending. Captive: 'Find me. Free me. Or join me.' Mourning: 'Forgive them. Forgive me.' Sovereign: 'I chose this. Understand why.' Each ~150-250 words. These are the emotional climax of each thread.

completion_criteria.criteria: Each sets up its thread's ending ritual

tasks.description: Write 3 ritual sequence texts (one per macro thread)
tasks.details: The 3-step ritual at the ritual circle. Captive (Reversal): place doll, pour water, read book -- 'Elizabeth Ashworth. Born in light. Free.' Mourning (Forgiveness): place 3 documents, read each -- 'They were afraid. She was alone. But she forgives.' Sovereign (Acceptance): place mask, touch drawings, speak name -- 'I chose this. The house has eyes because I gave it eyes.' Each step has narration text. 3 texts per step x 3 steps = 9 texts.

completion_criteria.criteria: Each thread has 3 ritual step texts
ritual_sequence_texts in MacroThread has 3+ entries each

tasks.description: Write Freedom ending text (Captive positive, 5 lines)
tasks.details: The cage opens. Light floods in. She leaves. 5 lines shown sequentially with timing. Triumphant, cathartic. Counter-magic liberates her.

tasks.description: Write Forgiveness ending text (Mourning positive, 5 lines)
tasks.details: Documents burn. Drawings fade. Peace. 5 lines. Reconciliatory, quiet.

tasks.description: Write Acceptance ending text (Sovereign positive, 5 lines)
tasks.details: Drawings GLOW instead of fading. She doesn't leave. She welcomes you. 5 lines. Awe, understanding.

tasks.description: Write Escape ending text (shared negative, 5 lines)
tasks.details: Player flees without completing ritual. Door slams. Finality. Available on all threads.

tasks.description: Write Joined ending text (shared negative, 5 lines)
tasks.details: Player becomes trapped with Elizabeth. Dark. Available on all threads.

Each has: junction_id, junction_type, functional_slot, variant_a (VariantDecl), variant_b (VariantDecl), macro_preference dict. Reference: WEAVE_PLAYTEST.md junction map.

tasks.description: Implement Swap #1: Foyer clock puzzle (A) + mirror puzzle (B)
tasks.details: Clock A: tap clock face -> move hands -> set to clue time -> hidden compartment -> flavor item. Mirror B: tap mirror at specific state -> Elizabeth reflected -> tap sequence -> mirror swings open -> hidden letter. Self-contained, no main puzzle chain impact. Reference: WEAVE_PLAYTEST.md Swap 1.

Mirror puzzle B variant defined with tap sequence
Neither affects main puzzle chain (reward is flavor only)

tasks.description: Implement Swap #2: Boiler room pipe valve (A) + electrical panel (B)
tasks.details: Pipes A: 3 valves turned in sequence (listen for pitch changes) -> pipes carry Elizabeth's voice -> bonus dialogue. Electrical B: rearrange fuses in fuse box -> restore power -> lights reveal hidden details. Self-contained. Reference: WEAVE_PLAYTEST.md Swap 2.

tasks.description: Implement Swap #3: Garden fountain (A) + gazebo lattice (B)
tasks.details: Fountain A: thaw ice with warm item -> read inscription -> clue. Gazebo B: stand at specific spot -> vine pattern reveals symbol -> same clue. Both deliver the same clue differently. Self-contained. Reference: WEAVE_PLAYTEST.md Swap 3.

tasks.description: Implement PRNG junction resolution with macro_preference
tasks.details: Extend prng_engine.gd to resolve the full junction set: 1) Seed -> macro thread selection (3-way). 2) For each of 9 junctions, use macro_preference[current_thread] as default. 3) On repeat playthroughs of same thread, PRNG can flip some junctions for variety (controlled flip probability). 4) Patch all affected room declarations: set interactables_active/static, swap clue_overrides, update gives_item references. 5) Validate all flips against constraint graph. Total: 3 macro x 2 puzzle paths x 8 swap combos = 48 configurations.

completion_criteria.criteria: Supports flip probability for repeat playthroughs

tasks.description: Implement constraint validation (dependency graph, solvability check)
tasks.details: Build puzzle dependency graph validator: 1) For each PRNG configuration, build directed graph of puzzle dependencies. 2) Verify no cycles. 3) Verify all prerequisites are achievable (no items locked behind their own door). 4) Verify counter-ritual has access to all required components. 5) Reject configurations that create impossible or trivial games. 6) Log validation results. This is PuzzleVariation.constraint enforcement. Run for all 48 configurations.

tasks.description: Wire godot-psx (global dither + fade + sky shader)
tasks.details: Ensure psx_dither.gdshader applied globally via SubViewportContainer in main.tscn. Wire psx_fade.gdshader for room transitions (controlled by room_assembler). Wire psx_sky.gdshader to WorldEnvironment for exterior rooms. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 1.

completion_criteria.criteria: Sky shader visible in exterior rooms

tasks.details: Generate .dialogue files from room declarations. For each InteractableDecl with responses, create dialogue entries with conditional branches. Custom balloon scene with Cinzel (titles) + Cormorant (body). Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 2.

completion_criteria.criteria: Custom balloon scene uses correct fonts

tasks.details: On startup, read all ItemDeclaration files and create gloot ProtoTree item prototypes. When InteractableDecl has gives_item, call gloot-backed give_item. Inventory UI in pause menu reads from gloot Inventory. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 3.

completion_criteria.criteria: Items given through interaction_engine work with gloot

tasks.details: Connect audio_engine.gd to AdaptiSound addon. Base ambient layer from room ambient_loop, tension layer from tension_loop activated by elizabeth_aware, SFX through play_sfx. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 4, AUDIO_WIRING_PLAN.md.

Room assembler tags floor collision with footstep_surface metadata from RoomDeclaration. MaterialFootstepPlayer3D on player reads metadata and plays matching audio. 9 surfaces: marble, wood_parquet, stone, metal_grate, rough_wood, carpet, dirt, grass, gravel. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 5, AUDIO_WIRING_PLAN.md section 10.

completion_criteria.criteria: 9 surface types mapped to audio directories

tasks.details: For interactables with types painting/note/photo on walls, place inspection PhantomCamera3D. On interact: priority 20. On dismiss: priority 0. For rooms with show_room_name entry trigger, create RoomReveal camera sweep. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 6.

completion_criteria.criteria: Room reveal sweep on first entry

tasks.description: Wire limboai HSM (game phases + Elizabeth sub-HSM)
tasks.details: Build LimboHSM at runtime from WorldDeclaration phases, phase_transitions, elizabeth_states, elizabeth_transitions. Phase changes drive: tension volume, flicker intensity, Elizabeth presence effects. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 10.

completion_criteria.criteria: Phase changes affect audio and lighting

tasks.details: trigger_engine applies camera_shake from ActionDecl. Profiles: 0.02=subtle, 0.1=discovery, 0.3=horror, 0.5=ritual. Checks AccessibilityDecl.camera_shake_enabled before applying. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 7.

Each PuzzleDeclaration auto-generates a Quest resource. Quest starts when first step's required_state is evaluable. Quest completes on completion_state. Quest progress shown in pause menu. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 8.

All state variables from StateSchema serialized on save. Current room, player position, inventory (via gloot), quest states, PRNG seed all saved. Auto-save on room transitions. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md addon integration section 9.

Run test_generator.gd against all declarations to produce gdUnit4 test scripts. Cover: room structure (interactable IDs, connection targets, light count), puzzle chains (step simulation), connection bidirectionality, PRNG seed validation, ending trigger conditions. Reference: ENGINE_SPEC.md 'Test Generator' section.

completion_criteria.criteria: Test scripts generated for all 20 rooms
Tests cover interactable presence, connections, lighting

tasks.description: Validate all 48 configurations (3 threads x 2 paths x 8 swaps)
tasks.details: Run PRNG engine with seeds that produce all 48 configurations. For each: verify all puzzles solvable, all items reachable, all endings achievable, no dead ends. Log each configuration's junction resolution and validation result.
For every Connection A->B, verify B->A exists. Check position_in_to matches spawn expectations. Check locked/key_id consistency between directions.

tasks.description: Validate puzzle dependency graph per thread
tasks.details: For each macro thread, verify the puzzle dependency graph has no unreachable nodes. The counter-ritual requires 5 other puzzles; each of those has prerequisites. Verify the full chain is satisfiable for both A and B puzzle paths.

completion_criteria.criteria: Dependency graph has no unreachable nodes per thread
Counter-ritual prerequisites achievable on all paths

tasks.details: Run the full test suite headless. Current test has 57 assertions. New engine tests will add room structure, puzzle, connection, PRNG validation. All must pass.
Build Android APK using export preset. Verify it installs on emulator, launches, shows front gate, player can navigate to foyer. Smoke test only -- full QA is separate.

completion_criteria.criteria: Game launches and front gate loads
